templates.name: Incident Detected
templates.template: Incident '{incident_id}' (Severity {severity}) created by '{owning_tenant_name}': '{title}'. Created: {create_date}, Impact start: {impact_start_date}. Status: {status}.
templates.extracted_when: An incident exists in the dataset for the relevant time window, regardless of outage confirmation status.

templates.name: Confirmed Outage
templates.template: Incident '{incident_id}' (Severity {severity}) by '{owning_tenant_name}' is a confirmed outage: '{title}'. Impact started: {impact_start_date}. {child_count} child incidents. Confirmed outages are the strongest indicator of customer-facing service failure.
templates.extracted_when: The incident has IsOutage set to true, confirming customer-facing impact.

templates.name: Widespread Confirmed Outage with Child Incidents
templates.template: Confirmed outage '{incident_id}' (Severity {severity}) by '{owning_tenant_name}' has {child_count} child incidents: '{title}'. Impact started: {impact_start_date}. Confirmed outage with multiple child incidents indicates widespread verified impact across teams or regions.
templates.extracted_when: Confirmed outage (IsOutage=true) with 3+ child incidents — multi-team/region impact.

templates.name: Customer-Correlated Confirmed Outage
templates.template: Confirmed outage '{incident_id}' (Severity {severity}) by '{owning_tenant_name}' is linked to support ticket '{support_ticket_id}': '{title}'. This directly correlates a confirmed platform outage with a customer complaint — direct correlation with verified customer-facing failure.
templates.extracted_when: Confirmed outage (IsOutage=true) linked to customer's SupportTicketId — direct correlation with verified customer-facing failure.

templates.name: Multiple Confirmed Outages Detected
templates.template: {incident_count} confirmed outages detected for '{owning_tenant_name}': [{incident_ids}]. Max severity: {max_severity}. Earliest impact: {earliest_impact_date}. Multiple confirmed outages from the same tenant indicate a systemic verified failure pattern.
templates.extracted_when: Multiple confirmed outages (IsOutage=true) from same tenant — systemic confirmed failure pattern.
